description: endota spa Fremantle is a sanctuary of calm offering signature endota rituals, facials, body treatments, massage and day spa packages. Nestled in the heart of Fremantle, this iconic Australian spa brand delivers transformative wellness experiences using organic, plant-based formulations.

endota spa Joondalup offers a full day spa experience including facials, body rituals, massage therapies and wellness packages in the northern suburbs of Perth. Experience endota's signature organic treatments in a serene, beautifully designed environment.
address: Lakeside Joondalup Shopping City, Joondalup WA 6027

description: endota spa Subiaco is a premium day spa offering facials, body treatments, and holistic wellness rituals in the heart of Subiaco. Their certified therapists use endota's acclaimed organic product range for deeply nourishing treatments.

Ember Bathhouse is Perth's premier wellness destination offering infrared sauna sessions, cold plunge therapy, float therapy, and holistic wellness treatments. Located in Osborne Park, Ember provides a sanctuary for recovery, relaxation and deep wellness restoration.

Float Fremantle specialises in float therapy (sensory deprivation tanks) and holistic wellness treatments. Experience the profound benefits of floating — stress relief, pain management, improved sleep and deep mental clarity — in their purpose-built float suites.

Perth Float Centre offers float therapy in state-of-the-art float pods providing complete sensory deprivation for physical recovery, anxiety relief and deep relaxation. Located in Northbridge, they specialise in float tank therapy, infrared sauna and holistic wellness.

Soul Float Studio in Leederville offers premium float therapy experiences in luxury float pods. Known for their serene environment and expert guidance, Soul Float helps clients achieve deep relaxation, pain relief and mental clarity through sensory deprivation floatation therapy.

businessName: The Day Spa at Crown Perth
description: The Day Spa at Crown Perth is one of Perth's most luxurious spa destinations, offering a full menu of facials, body treatments, massage therapies and day spa packages. Set within Crown's world-class entertainment precinct in Burswood, this prestigious spa offers unparalleled indulgence.

businessName: Elemis Spa at The COMO The Treasury
description: Nestled within COMO The Treasury, Perth's most storied five-star hotel, this Elemis-partnered spa delivers world-class facial therapies, body treatments and holistic wellness rituals. Using Elemis' acclaimed science-backed formulations, the spa offers transformative skin and body experiences in an historic CBD setting.

Noosa Longue Day Spa in Cottesloe is a boutique wellness sanctuary offering reflexology, aromatherapy, facials and day spa packages just steps from the iconic Cottesloe Beach. Their holistic approach combines traditional and modern therapies for complete mind-body restoration.

businessName: Bodhi J Day Spa Mount Lawley
description: Bodhi J Day Spa in Mount Lawley is a beloved Perth wellness destination offering customised facials, body rituals, reflexology and day spa packages. With a philosophy rooted in holistic wellbeing, Bodhi J creates personalised treatment experiences in a serene, beautifully decorated environment.

Savasana Beauty and Wellness in Cottesloe is a holistic spa sanctuary offering day spa packages, aromatherapy treatments, reflexology, meditation and mindful beauty rituals. Their team of wellness experts craft deeply restorative experiences tailored to each individual's needs.

Djurra Day Spa in Fremantle is an Indigenous-inspired wellness sanctuary offering traditional healing therapies, holistic body treatments and day spa packages infused with native Australian botanical ingredients. A unique and deeply restorative wellness experience in historic Fremantle.

Wellspring Day Spa is a comprehensive wellness destination in Balcatta offering infrared sauna, floatation therapy, reflexology, aromatherapy and holistic day spa packages. Their expert therapists guide clients through transformative wellness journeys using premium natural products.

Reflex Zone is Perth's premier reflexology studio in the CBD, offering therapeutic foot and hand reflexology treatments to relieve stress, improve circulation and restore whole-body balance. Their certified reflexologists combine traditional Chinese reflexology with Western therapeutic techniques.

Aroma Wellness Studio in Subiaco is a dedicated aromatherapy and holistic wellness practice offering bespoke aromatherapy treatments, essential oil consultations, and wellness coaching. Their certified aromatherapists blend custom essential oil formulations for each client's unique wellbeing needs.

Float Life Perth in Fremantle offers float therapy, infrared sauna and guided meditation in a purpose-designed wellness centre. Their float therapy pods provide the ultimate zero-gravity experience for deep physical recovery, stress relief and mental clarity.

Stillwater Day Spa in Nedlands is an intimate wellness sanctuary offering customised facials, body wraps, reflexology, and holistic day spa packages. Their therapists take a whole-person approach to wellness, crafting restorative treatments that nourish body, mind and spirit.

Mind Body Wellness Centre in Claremont is a holistic health hub offering naturopathy, aromatherapy, meditation classes, reflexology and wellness coaching. Their multidisciplinary team of wellness practitioners guide clients through personalised healing journeys.

Aurora Wellness Spa is Mandurah's premier day spa offering holistic wellness treatments including aromatherapy, reflexology, float therapy and full day spa packages. Set in a serene coastal location, Aurora provides the perfect escape for deep relaxation and rejuvenation.

Palm Beach Wellness in Rockingham is a comprehensive wellness centre offering day spa packages, holistic body treatments, float therapy, infrared sauna and wellness coaching. Their expert team provides personalised care in a tranquil, resort-like environment.

The Wellness Sanctuary in Duncraig is a Northern suburbs wellness retreat offering naturopathy, aromatherapy, reflexology and holistic day spa treatments. Their dedicated team creates deeply personalised wellness experiences in a calm, restorative environment.

Lotus Day Spa in Stirling is a serene wellness haven offering a complete range of day spa treatments including facials, body rituals, reflexology, aromatherapy and couples spa packages. Their expert therapists use premium organic products for deeply nourishing experiences.

Qi Wellness Centre in Northbridge is a holistic wellness studio offering traditional Chinese wellness therapies, meditation, qi gong, aromatherapy and reflexology. Their practitioners blend Eastern healing wisdom with contemporary wellness science for transformative results.

businessName: Serenity Wellness and Float Centre Osborne Park
description: Serenity Wellness and Float Centre in Osborne Park specialises in float therapy, infrared sauna, holistic massage and wellness packages. Their state-of-the-art float pods and warm, welcoming team provide the ultimate in stress relief and whole-body restoration.

Zenith Day Spa in Karrinyup offers premium wellness treatments including full body rituals, aromatherapy, reflexology and day spa packages in Perth's northern suburbs. Set in a beautifully decorated space, Zenith provides the perfect sanctuary for total mind and body renewal.

Tranquillity Wellness Spa in Victoria Park is an inner-city oasis offering holistic wellness treatments, day spa packages, aromatherapy and reflexology. Their skilled therapists create tailored wellness experiences to restore balance and vitality in the heart of Perth.

Elixir Wellness Studio in Canning Vale is a holistic wellness and day spa centre offering full body treatments, naturopathic consultations, aromatherapy and reflexology in Perth's southern corridor. Their expert team delivers whole-body wellness experiences in a serene, nurturing environment.

Recharge Wellness in Joondalup is a modern wellness centre offering float therapy, cryotherapy, infrared sauna, reflexology and holistic wellness packages in Perth's northern suburbs. Focused on recovery, restoration and rejuvenation for mind and body.

Harmony Day Spa in Midland brings premium day spa experiences to Perth's eastern corridor, offering full body rituals, aromatherapy, reflexology and wellness packages. Their warm, attentive team creates personalised treatments for complete relaxation and restoration.

Pacific Wellness Spa in Scarborough is a coastal wellness haven offering day spa packages, holistic body treatments, aromatherapy and reflexology near Perth's iconic Scarborough Beach. Experience total relaxation just steps from the Indian Ocean.
